rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOAN C KNOX
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to September 8, 2014 for proper notice. The proof of service filed shows notice of the amended report given 8/11/14, but the amended report was not filed until 8/14/14. Notice cannot be mailed before the pleading requiring notice has been filed - Local Rule 14.21.A. New notice must be sent no later than 8/24/14 that shows the continued hearing date of 9/8/14. Proof of service must be filed by Wednesday, September 3.
